channel.title: All Teams - Release Notes
channel.description: Combined release notes from all teams

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android Beta
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Share your Scribes across multiple teams
item.description:
Scribe

Loading... Loading...

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Share your Scribes across multiple teams
item.description:
Scribe

Loading...

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Create fully native and editable presentations with Gemini in Google Slides
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can now create a full, multi-slide presentation using Gemini in Google Slides. With a single prompt, you can ground the presentation in existing content from Google Drive, match the style of another presentation, and build fully editable slides, allowing you to make any necessary adjustments....

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - June 26, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page vi
item.description:
Canva

New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page views, and Get design analytics links. These APIs let you retrieve engagement metrics for a design shared via Canva.

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 26.0.2
item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 and above includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components. Important upgrade information: Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Data regions support for the Gemini app now available
item.description:
Google Workspace

Beginning today, the Gemini app adheres to your organization’s data regionalization requirements. As with Google Workspace, admins have the flexibility to configure controls for EU storage and processing, US storage and processing, or both, including granular settings down to the organizational...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Assign mobile device management admin privileges based on organizational unit
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re giving admins more granular control over how mobile device management privileges are delegated. Specifically, admins can be assigned privileges for specific organizational units (OUs), adding another layer of security by scoping access only to necessary OUs.Previously available in beta, we’re...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Educators and students can now share Gemini Canvas creations directly to Google Classroom
item.description:
Google Workspace

Educators and students of all ages can now seamlessly attach Gemini Canvas artifacts, like websites, quizzes, interactive games, infographics, and more, to Google Classroom assignments and posts. Right from Gemini Canvas, users can click on the “Share to to Classroom” button. This update allows...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Updated admin setting for improved video quality in Google Meet
item.description:
Google Workspace

In April 2026, we updated Meet to improve video quality on high-resolution displays. We’re now updating the way the Admin console setting that limits video bandwidth works to reduce data usage and improve call quality.Previously, the ‘Limit video bandwidth’ setting only limited video bandwidth on...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.6 beta 3 (25G5052e)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.5.2 (25F84)
item.description:
macOS

View downloads

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Version Types and Limit Editability
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now configure Version Types and Limit Editability to control how users interact with forms based on the type of version they're work...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New Block Kit container block
item.description:
Slack

The container block is now available for Block Kit use.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New response and request fields for Accounts API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new fields to Accounts API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Add chat channel tab migration API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added an API to migrate tabs for a chat channel.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 3.6.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Annotation supports snap to element.Optimized error messages.Optimized annotation eraser hit detection.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Update call queue custom groups
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added APIs to update custom groups in Zoom Phone call queues.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Add scheduled event attendee API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added an API to create a scheduled event attendee.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Weekly Recap - June 26, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Troubleshoot formula errors quickly with Gemini in Google SheetsWe’re excited to introduce a new Gemini in Sheets capability that enables you to diagnose and fix formula errors in one click. When you encounter a formula error, Gemini can analyze the surrounding data structure to help provide an...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail launch of new WIP improvements
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, and are excited to begin rolling out the new Windows Insider experience to retail Windows 11 builds this week! New Windows Insider Program changes The post Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Streamline your data backups with incremental exports for Google Workspace
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Workspace administrators can now utilize incremental exports when backing up organizational data. Instead of re-exporting their entire organization's data, admins can export frequent snapshots of their data into their organization’s own Google Cloud Storage (GCS) bucket.Key benefits include...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field na
item.description:
Canva

You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field names and types for a design, and the Create design autofill job API now supports a create_from_design value for type that uses those fields to create...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Read Along in Google Classroom is now available to all education users to support foundational literacy
item.description:
Google Workspace

Read Along in Google Classroom, an AI-powered literacy tool that provides in-the-moment support to students as they read aloud, is now available to all Google Workspace for Education users at no cost. We believe this will open access to literacy tools for millions of students, and help educators...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Resubmit Withdrawn Documents
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now edit and resubmit withdrawn documents without starting over. Previously, withdrawing a document was a permanent action. If you n...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New File Content webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new webhook for File Content.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Update Clip share settings
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added a new API to update a clip's sharing settings.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New Workspaces webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new webhook for Workspaces.

View release notes →

Claude

item.title: Claude - Trusted Devices

Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Stricter classifications for Google Groups to enhance data security and privacy
item.description:
Google Workspace

Earlier this year, we announced changes to Google Groups to enhance data security and privacy. The changes, which are rolling out now, include:Stricter “internal” and “external” classifications for GroupsClearer visual indicators for whether a group contains external membersChanges to how emails...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Updates to Gemini in Google Classroom
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are introducing several updates to the Gemini tab in Google Classroom designed to make its tools even more helpful for teachers. These changes make it easier for educators to collaborate with AI and create visual aids from any device, while expanding options for refining lesson plans.Mobile...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Scheduled Secondary Workflows
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now automate workflow actions based on dates, helping you send reminders, trigger integrations, and manage time-sensitive processes ...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Bridge the Linux Gap with NinjaOne 14.0: Seamlessly Discover, Deploy, and Support Every Endpoint
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 14.0 release expands on the platform’s unified experience, offering IT professionals unparalleled visibility and control across operating systems. These enhancements eliminate operational gaps with remote support, automated deployment, and data protection all in one interface. Explore...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add callbacks and interfaces in zoom_meeting_participants_ctrl.js; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download; fixed a breakout-room joining issue.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download; fixed a webinar active-share issue with unsubscribing.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; remove zMacResRetina.bundle library; add AI Companion support in breakout rooms; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download; fixed a freezing issue when joining 800+-participant meetings.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Connect to Google Meet hardware with room codes now in Early Preview
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Meet users can now connect to nearby conference room hardware by entering a 5-character room code on their personal device. Meet recently launched Connect Room using proximity-based detection to identify nearby hardware. This update provides a reliable manual fallback when ultrasound is...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - The best AI is your AI. Brain² is here.
item.description:
ClickUp

The best AI is Brain². Guaranteed.Brain² is your company AI that self-improves, routes to the best models, and actually completes your work - creating websites, building slides, and managing projects. It's multiplayer AI where human intelligence becomes your collective Brain.Your context. Already...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Apps Script is now a Google Workspace core service with enterprise-grade data protection
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Apps Script is officially a Google Workspace core service. Covered under the Google Cloud Terms of Service and Google Workspace for Education Terms of Service, Apps Script now offers the same enterprise-grade data protection, robust administrative controls, and standard technical support...

View release notes →

Kuali Build

We’re excited to introduce Inline Document Creation, a new way to create and link related documents while you continue working. This helps u...

item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to introduce Data Mappings, a new feature that allows users to automatically populate editable fields in a document using data...

item.title: Zoom - Manage chat channel ownership and access encryption details
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added an API to transfer ownership of chat channels and enhanced the Chat Session Report API with an `encryption_info` response field for retrieving encryption-related details.

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for Experimental
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, including Windows 11, version 26H2 for Experimental. Windows 11, version 26H2 Windows 11, version 26H2 represents our yearly second half The post Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value is create_from_brand_template, which is the existing functionality for creating new designs from a brand template. For backwards compatibility,...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Slack CLI v4.3.0
item.description:
Slack

Version 4.3.0 of the Slack CLI is here!

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Announcing the Slackbot MCP Client
item.description:
Slack

We're excited to introduce you to the Slackbot MCP Client, which gives you the ability to superpower Slackbot with your desired tools.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Update on Pulse
item.description:
ChatGPT

Pulse is being sunset as proactive updates move into scheduled tasks. Pro users will continue to have access for 14 days from today. To keep receiving daily updates, you can ask ChatGPT to schedule a daily briefing based on your interests and past chats.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Availability and limits
item.description:
ChatGPT

Rolling out to Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise users.Active task limits vary by tier. Tasks cannot run more than once per hour, and unattended tasks may automatically pause after a period of inactivity.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - What’s changing
item.description:
ChatGPT

A new Scheduled page, discoverable in the sidebar, gives users one place to view active tasks, see when they’ll run next, and pause, resume, edit, or delete them.All tasks are faster and more reliable.Users can schedule work for specific times or broader windows, such as morning, afternoon, or...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - System notifications now delivered by "Slack" instead of Slackbot
item.description:
Slack

Slack system notifications (such as channel membership changes, User Group updates, Slack Connect alerts, and retention policy notices) are now delivered from the "Slack" system user (USLACK) instead of Slackbot.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Reorder Table and Repeater Rows with Drag and Drop
item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to introduce a new way to manage data in Table and Repeater gadgets. Users can now reorder rows using drag-and-drop functional...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The preview Get design pages API now returns an id for each page, which can be used to correlate pages with per-page data from other APIs.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - Design responses now include a design_types field, and DesignPage responses now include a design_type field. These indicate the type of content a desi
item.description:
Canva

Design responses now include a design_types field, and DesignPage responses now include a design_type field. These indicate the type of content a design or page contains, such as doc or presentation. The value unknown is returned when the type cannot be determined. This list may be extended in the...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New Block Kit data visualization block
item.description:
Slack

The data visualization block is now available for Block Kit use.

View release notes →

Windows

Release notes for inbox Windows 11 apps Windows 11 inbox apps are now getting their own release notes sectio The post Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026 appeared first on...

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data fields are currently a preview feature.

item.title: ChatGPT - Active sessions
item.description:
ChatGPT

Review first-party OpenAI sessions from Settings > Security > Active sessions, with available details such as device, app, approximate location, sign-in time, trusted-device status, and whether it is the current sessionLog out of individual sessions or all sessions from Active sessions Active...

View release notes →

Slack

* We've added authorship arguments (iconemoji, iconurl, and username) to the assistant.threads.setStatus and chat.startStream API methods.

item.title: Gemini - Why: We want to empower users to create, regardless of their technical skill set or access to complex software. With Gemini Omni, your natural langu
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We want to empower users to create, regardless of their technical skill set or access to complex software. With Gemini Omni, your natural language is the only tool you need to direct, refine, and produce captivating videos.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Gemini Omni helps you create and edit videos as easily as having a conversation. It’s like Nano Banana for videos. Blend any combination of te
item.description:
Gemini

What: Gemini Omni helps you create and edit videos as easily as having a conversation. It’s like Nano Banana for videos. Blend any combination of text, photos, and video to create high-quality video. You can even drop yourself right into the action by creating a custom AI avatar that looks and...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: With Gemini Spark, we are transforming Gemini from an AI assistant that answers your questions into one that actually works proactively on your
item.description:
Gemini

Why: With Gemini Spark, we are transforming Gemini from an AI assistant that answers your questions into one that actually works proactively on your behalf.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Gemini Spark introduces a whole new way to get things done. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on your tasks on your behalf. G
item.description:
Gemini

What: Gemini Spark introduces a whole new way to get things done. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on your tasks on your behalf. Gemini Spark is rolling out today to trusted testers and in Beta to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and over in the United States in the coming...

item.description:

What: Gemini Spark introduces a whole new way to get things done. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on your tasks on your behalf. Gemini Spark is rolling out today to trusted testers and in Beta to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and over in the United States in the coming...

item.title: ChatGPT - File library expands to Free and Go users, with storage management
item.description:
ChatGPT

File library is expanding to Free and Go users, including to users in the European Economic Area (EEA) making it easier to find, reuse, and build on files you upload or create in ChatGPT. You can add recent files from the composer, browse saved files in Library, and ask ChatGPT about files you’ve...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new Release Preview builds for 14 May 2026
item.description:
Windows

[19 May 2026: Updated build numbers for new releases containing bug fixes - see release notes for details] Hello Windows Insiders, Today we're releasing new builds for Release Preview across our supported versions of Windows 11. Please see the bu The post Announcing new Release Preview builds for...

View release notes →
